code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Security_ZeroTrust] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {Security_ZeroTrust] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [Security_OAuth2]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {Security_ZeroTrust] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [Security_Firewall]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {Security_IntrusionDetection] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [Security_OAuth2]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [Security_Firewall]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个熔断器的状态图，核心场景是ZeroTrust安全架构下的服务保护。三个主状态：CLOSED正常放行、OPEN完全阻断、HALF_OPEN试探恢复。每个状态内部要有具体的子行为节点。
明白，CLOSED状态内部我打算放Normal作为默认行为，然后失败时走IncrementFailures累加计数，再判断CheckThreshold。成功的话用ResetCount清零。这样符合你的设计吗？
对，阈值设为3次。CheckThreshold那里，小于3回Normal，等于3的时候要跳出到OAuth2安全域。另外OPEN状态里，所有请求都要抛CircuitBreakerError，用BlockCalls处理。
OPEN状态画好了。BlockCalls之后是CheckTimeout计时，60秒内保持阻断，超时后进入HALF_OPEN。不过这里有个问题——超时到达时应该转到哪个安全域？
超时后先进入HALF_OPEN的TestRecovery节点，只允许一个测试调用。测试走EvaluateResult判断结果：成功回CLOSED并接入OAuth2，失败的话要ReOpen并退到Firewall安全域。
HALF_OPEN的两个出口我确认一下：测试成功走CLOSED，测试失败回到OPEN。还有，三个主状态的颜色区分——CLOSED用绿色系，OPEN用红色系警示，HALF_OPEN用黄色提醒，可以吗？
稍等，HALF_OPEN的入口安全域我写错了——应该是Security_IntrusionDetection而不是ZeroTrust。ZeroTrust只在CLOSED和OPEN的入口。帮我修正一下。
已修正。现在结构完整了：CLOSED绿色#4CAF50，OPEN红色#F44336，HALF_OPEN黄色#FFC107。所有状态跳转和安全域接入都按你的要求配置好了。
